title: Lead Instructional Designer at BITS Pilani

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at BITS Pilani
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BITS Pilani. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About BITS Pilani:
BITS Pilani is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani!
